name: agentic-os
description: MyBrain Agentic OS Dashboard — local command center for the MyBrain vault

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
